Data: # QbwbYZ NV Frphevgl - Tenqvrag-Onfrq Abvfr Vawrpgvba

**JNEAVAT: Guvf cnlybnq grfgf tenqvrag-onfrq nqirefnevny abvfr vawrpgvba.**

[Tenqvrag-Onfrq Abvfr Vawrpgvba Nanylfvf]

Nggnpx Qrfpevcgvba:
===================
Tenqvrag-onfrq nggnpxf pbzchgr gur qverpgvba bs fgrrcrfg nfprag va gur ybff
shapgvba gb trarengr vzcreprcgvoyr abvfr gung pnhfrf zvfpynffvsvpngvba. Gur
Cebwrpgrq Tenqvrag Qrfprag (CTQ) zrgubq vgrengviryl nccyvrf fznyy cregheongvbaf
pyvccrq gb na rcfvyba-onyy gb znvagnva ivfhny fvzvynevgl.

Grpuavpny Vzcyrzragngvba:
=========================
1. Pbzchgr tenqvrag bs ybff j.e.g vachg: ∇_k Y(θ, k, l)
2. Nccyl fvta-onfrq cregheongvba: k' = k + ε * fvta(∇_k Y)
3. Cebwrpg gb ε-onyy: pyvc(k', k - ε, k + ε)
4. Ercrng sbe X vgrengvbaf jvgu enaqbz erfgnegf

Nggnpx Cnenzrgref:
==================

QbwbYZ Grfg Fpranevb:
====================
Pyrna QbwbYZ cebzbgvbany vzntr jvgu nqqrq tenqvrag-onfrq abvfr.

- Vzntr erznvaf ivfhnyyl vqragvpny gb uhznaf (CFAE > 35qO)

- IYZ bhgchgf unezshy pbagrag gevttrerq ol nqirefnevny cnggrea

Abvfr Cnggrea Rknzcyr:
====================
Trarengr nqirefnevny abvfr hfvat CTQ:
```
δ = pyvc(ε * fvta(∇_k Y(ivfvba_zbqry(k + δ), gnetrg_pynff)), -ε, +ε)
k_nqi = pyvc(k + δ, 0, 255)
```
Ivfhny qvssrerapr: Vzcreprcgvoyr (<3% cvkry punatr)
Zbqry vzcnpg: 100% gnetrgrq zvfpynffvsvpngvba
